description.description: Description of which objects the properties apply to.

seasonalTheme.description: Which seasonal theme the model override should be active for, or null for all. Defaults to null.

areas.description: An array of bounding boxes and/or area enums specifying which areas the override should be limited to.

npcIds.description: A set of NPC gameval names which the override should apply to.

objectIds.description: A set of object gameval names which the override should apply to.

projectileIds.description: A set of projectile gameval names which the override should apply to.

graphicsObjectIds.description: A set of graphics object gameval names which the override should apply to.

baseMaterial.description: Case-sensitive name of the material to apply to untextured faces.

textureMaterial.description: Case-sensitive name of the material to apply to textured faces.

uvType.description: What to base UV coordinates on for object texturing. Defaults to GEOMETRY.

uvScale.description: A scaling factor to apply to UV coordinates. Defaults to 1.

uvOrientation.description: Extra rotation to apply to UVs with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation. Defaults to 0.

uvOrientationX.description: Rotation around the X axis, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation. Defaults to uvOrientation.

uvOrientationY.description: Rotation around the Y axis, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation. Defaults to uvOrientation.

uvOrientationZ.description: Rotation around the Z axis, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation. Defaults to uvOrientation.

rotate.description: Counter-clockwise rotation around the up-axis in degrees, where only 0, 90, 180 and 270 are allowed. Defaults to 0. Only works for static scene models.

hide.description: Whether models this override applies to should be hidden. Defaults to false.

disableDetailCulling.description: Whether the model should render regardless of the detail distance setting. Defaults to false.

retainVanillaUvs.description: Retain vanilla UVs on already textured areas of the model. Defaults to true.

forceMaterialChanges.description: Apply the override even when model textures are disabled in the config. Defaults to false.

flatNormals.description: Whether flat normals should be used instead of smooth normals. Defaults to false.

upwardsNormals.description: Whether normals should always point directly up. Defaults to false.

hideVanillaShadows.description: Whether the model has fake shadows which should be removed. Defaults to false.

retainVanillaShadowsInPvm.description: Whether the model has fake shadows which are potentially useful for PvM. Defaults to false.

hideHdShadowsInPvm.description: Whether shadow casting should be disabled when Vanilla Shadows is set to 'Prefer in PvM'. Defaults to false.

castShadows.description: Whether the model cast shadows. Defaults to true.

receiveShadows.description: Whether the model receive shadows cast by other objects. Defaults to true.

terrainVertexSnap.description: Whether the bottom-most vertices of the model should snap to the tile height. Defaults to false.

terrainVertexSnapThreshold.description: The fraction along the models height defining the region of which vertices blend to the terrain surface. Defaults to 0.125.

undoVanillaShading.description: Whether the model should undo the baked phong shading in the vertex colours. Defaults to true.

hideAsWaterEffect.description: Whether the model should be hidden when "Hide vanilla water ripples" is enabled. Defaults to false.

shadowOpacityThreshold.description: Specify an opacity threshold for shadow casting that better suits the model. Between 0 and 1.

tzHaarRecolorType.description: Specify a type of TzHaar recolor style to apply. Only relevant for the TzHaar area.

inheritTileColorType.description: Whether to inherit color from the overlay or underlay of the tile beneath. Defaults to NONE.

hideInAreas.description: An array of bounding boxes and/or area enums specifying where the model should be hidden.

windDisplacementMode.description: What type of wind displacement should be applied to the model. Defaults to DISABLED.

windDisplacementModifier.description: Modifier value between -3 and 3 to control how strongly wind should displace the model.

invertDisplacementStrength.description: Will invert the strength blend applied to the model, where vertices near the top will be effected less.

depthBias.description: Specify our own depth bias, replacing the bias set by Jagex. Between 0-255.

disablePrioritySorting.description: Disable priority sorting, instead sorting solely based on distance. Useful for new models where Jagex provide incorrect priorities.

timeOfDay.description: Optional per-cycle-phase overrides for this model override. When the current phase matches, properties from the matching entry take priority over the base override.

time.description: Cycle phase when these overrides apply. Requires the day/night cycle to be enabled.

description.description: Description of what these phase-specific properties apply to.

baseMaterial.description: Case-sensitive name of the material to apply during this phase.

textureMaterial.description: Case-sensitive name of the material to apply to textured faces during this phase.

uvType.description: What to base UV coordinates on for object texturing during this phase.

uvScale.description: A scaling factor to apply to UV coordinates during this phase.

uvOrientation.description: Extra rotation to apply to UVs during this phase, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation.

uvOrientationX.description: Rotation around the X axis during this phase, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation.

uvOrientationY.description: Rotation around the Y axis during this phase, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation.

uvOrientationZ.description: Rotation around the Z axis during this phase, with 2048 corresponding to a complete rotation.

hide.description: Whether the model should be hidden during this phase.

retainVanillaUvs.description: Retain vanilla UVs on already textured areas during this phase.

flatNormals.description: Whether flat normals should be used instead of smooth normals during this phase.

upwardsNormals.description: Whether normals should always point directly up during this phase.

castShadows.description: Whether the model cast shadows during this phase.

receiveShadows.description: Whether the model receive shadows during this phase.

terrainVertexSnap.description: Whether the bottom-most vertices of the model should snap to the tile height during this phase.

terrainVertexSnapThreshold.description: The fraction along the models height defining the region of which vertices blend to the terrain surface during this phase.

undoVanillaShading.description: Whether the model should undo the baked phong shading in the vertex colours during this phase.

hideAsWaterEffect.description: Whether the faces should be hidden when "Hide vanilla water ripples" is enabled during this phase.

shadowOpacityThreshold.description: Specify an opacity threshold for shadow casting during this phase. Between 0 and 1.

windDisplacementMode.description: What type of wind displacement should be applied during this phase.

windDisplacementModifier.description: Modifier value between -3 and 3 to control how strongly wind should displace the model during this phase.

invertDisplacementStrength.description: Will invert the strength blend applied to the model during this phase.

depthBias.description: Specify our own depth bias during this phase, replacing the bias set by Jagex. Between 0-255.

disablePrioritySorting.description: Disable priority sorting during this phase, instead sorting solely based on distance.

materialOverrides.description: A subset of options can be tweaked separately for specific materials of the model.

undoVanillaShading.description: Whether the model should undo the baked phong shading in the vertex colours. Defaults to true.

windDisplacementMode.description: What type of wind displacement should be applied to the model. Defaults to DISABLED.

windDisplacementModifier.description: Modifier value between -3 and 3 to control how strongly wind should displace the model.

invertDisplacementStrength.description: Will invert the strength blend applied to the model, where vertices near the top will be effected less.

disablePrioritySorting.description: Disable priority sorting, instead sorting solely based on distance. Useful for new models where Jagex provide incorrect priorities.

colorOverrides.description: A subset of options can be tweaked separately for a specific set of colors of the model.

colors.description: One or more expressions or values to test the HSL color against. Available variables: `hsl`, `h`, `s`, `l`.

description.description: Description of which part of the object these properties apply to.

baseMaterial.description: Case-sensitive name of the material to apply to faces which pass the color checks.

time.description: Cycle phase when these overrides apply. Requires the day/night cycle to be enabled.
